title: keetia rufivillosa
intro: Keetia rufivillosa, also known as the Keetia or Yellow-flowered Keetia, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Keetia rufivillosa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, allowing for the utilization of its medicinal properties.
